## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Layer

Choose one: universal, architecture, stack, other policy, repository governance.

## Checks

- [ ] I ran or updated the relevant validation checks.
- [ ] I updated indexes, maps, or docs where required.
- [ ] I considered whether tests, examples, or smoke checks are needed.
- [ ] I reviewed the release checklist in `docs/review-checklist.md`.

## Contribution Certification

- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution.
- [ ] This contribution is licensed under the same license as this repository:
      Apache License 2.0.
- [ ] This contribution does not include secrets, credentials, customer data,
      confidential source code, private prompts, regulated data, local absolute
      paths, raw logs, raw evidence, copied worktrees, generated bundles, or
      materials I am not authorized to share.
- [ ] I disclosed any new dependencies and described their license, purpose,
      and security impact.
- [ ] I disclosed material AI assistance used to generate or edit this
      contribution, if any, and I remain responsible for its safety, originality,
      license compatibility, and correctness.
